highlights.title: World-Class Coastline
highlights.body: La Jolla Cove, Children's Pool, and Torrey Pines Beach put some of Southern California's most dramatic coastline within walking distance of most homes.

highlights.title: Village Culture & Dining
highlights.body: Prospect Street and Girard Avenue offer an exceptional concentration of acclaimed restaurants, independent galleries, boutique shops, and weekend farmers markets.

highlights.title: Research & Innovation Hub
highlights.body: UC San Diego, the Salk Institute, and Scripps Research anchor a world-renowned concentration of biotech and research institutions that drives strong long-term property values.

private.name: Our Lady of the Sacred Heart

highlights.title: Island Living, City Access
highlights.body: Coronado Island offers a peaceful, small-town atmosphere while remaining minutes from downtown San Diego by bridge or ferry — the best of both worlds.

highlights.title: Pristine Beach & Village
highlights.body: Consistently ranked among the nation's best beaches, Coronado Beach stretches for miles alongside a charming village of independent shops, acclaimed restaurants, and the legendary Hotel del Coronado.

highlights.title: Safety & Community
highlights.body: One of San Diego County's safest communities, Coronado boasts top-rated schools, strong civic pride, and a tight-knit neighborhood culture that draws buyers who plan to stay.

rancho-santa-fe.name: Rancho Santa Fe

highlights.title: The Covenant Lifestyle
highlights.body: Rancho Santa Fe's historic Covenant — the original planned community stretching across 6,400 acres — preserves strict architectural standards and mature eucalyptus groves that give the village its unmistakable character.

highlights.title: Equestrian & Recreational Culture
highlights.body: Miles of private riding trails, the RSF Golf Club, tennis and paddle facilities, and easy access to Del Mar's racetrack make this one of Southern California's most active luxury communities.

highlights.title: Privacy & Estate Acreage
highlights.body: Minimum lot sizes of one to two acres throughout The Covenant ensure privacy, mature landscaping, and the kind of estate-scale living that's increasingly rare in coastal Southern California.

rancho-santa-fe.schoolDistrict: Rancho Santa Fe School District / San Dieguito Union High School District
